title: DShield (Cowrie) Honeypot Stats and When Sessions Disconnect, (Mon, Mar 30th)
summary: A lot of the information seen on DShield honeypots [1] is repeated bot traffic, especially when looking at the Cowrie [2] telnet and SSH sessions. However, how long a session lasts, how many commands are run per session and what the last commands run before a session disconnects can vary. Some of th…
